positive: A mystical, geometric forest scene with glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. Focus on large, stylized, interlocking leaves and crystalline structures that form a repeating pattern. The color palette should utilize deep sapphire blue, vibrant turquoise, emerald green, and accents of neon yellow. Composition must be symmetrical and highly detailed, forming a strong central motif suitable for repeating fabric print. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau organic lines and futuristic geometric precision, rendered in a highly clean, silhouette-friendly vector art style. Studio lighting, high contrast, deep saturation, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, noise, logo, trademark, copyrighted character, graffiti, realism, photorealistic, messy, clutter
